body:

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Quick confession: I was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I was wrong | Friend --

With just a few hours to go until the May fundraising deadline, I want to confess something to you:

I was wrong.

I was sure that if Trump became the Republican nominee, this team would step up and the support would come pouring in.

In fact, we made budgetary plans for the rest of this campaign based on that assumption.

Instead, our fundraising has actually slowed down a little bit, and if things don't change, we'll have to adjust our plans, and run a smaller, less aggressive campaign -- which means that Donald Trump has a better chance of beating us.

**[So I'm asking you -- will you step up and donate before midnight? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2MjUzMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwMDM3NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

** Don’t get me wrong, you’ve been amazing. Every time we've been in a tough spot, you've shown up big. And supporters like you are the only reason we're just one week out from finishing this primary and nominating the first woman for president in either major political party.

I don’t take any of that for granted.

But this general election is going to be a different campaign from the primary. We won’t beat Donald Trump if we try to play his game -- we’re not going to race deeper and deeper into the gutter.

Instead, we’re going into more and more communities -- with organizers and volunteers who can talk directly to their friends and neighbors about the values we all share. And that means we need the resources to open field offices, install phone lines, host trainings, buy clipboards, and do all the other million little things it takes to win an honest-to-god grassroots campaign.

Today, I need you to step up again. I know sometimes it's easy to think of a donation of $1 as a token gesture -- but it's not. Grassroots donations like yours are literally how we're funding a campaign that will defeat Donald Trump.

**We're counting on your donation today. Chip in before midnight tonight:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2MjUzMzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwMDM3NTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever.**

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: Tonight's deadline
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In just a few hours, we're going to close the books on the final FEC fundraising deadline of the Democratic primary.
Here's the truth: we are still short of hitting the goals that will allow us to run the kind of campaign it takes to win in California. And what we'd really like is for that money to come from as many people as possible. That's been the spirit of this campaign from the start.
Adding your $2.70 contribution right now will help put us over the top. You can do that here:
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/final-deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-pm2-s3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-pm2-s3-full")
We have received over 8 million individual contributions since this campaign started a little over one year ago. That's a record at this point in any presidential race in history, and it's something Hillary Clinton's campaign can't come close to matching.
Adding one before midnight will ensure we have the resources to win in California next week.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-pm2-s3-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-pm2-s3-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Aisling Kerins, JayInslee.com
subject: Are you on our side?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We need you to show it NOW.

Friend --

name: Eric Hyers
subject: grand opening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

It's full steam ahead. Montana's primary elections are next Tuesday which means we are just a week away from kicking off the general election campaign. To get ready, Steve and Lt. Gov. Mike Cooney are going to be crisscrossing the state this weekend opening field offices and rallying supporters.

We're hard at work building a top-notch grassroots operation to re-elect Steve and win victories up and down the ballot -- and we're counting on you to be a part of it. **Check out the times and locations and click to RSVP below to join Steve and Mike on their statewide tour.**

We hope you'll stop in to see Steve, meet the field organizer for your community and join in the energy and enthusiasm it's going to take to win this November!

**[Bozeman:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9jeb4S15zhuL5lUkfAuTky0Z7kymSHZZ) **Friday at 5 PM

**[Billings](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jqGfoPkKXzkWm%2BvLL%2FFGgC0Z7kymSHZZ) **Saturday at 9 AM

**[Great Falls:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CiQu2uHHhc7LZg3710k5PS0Z7kymSHZZ) **Saturday at 3 PM

**[Butte:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fOmxR%2BdyKfpFuOI5le7Q%2Bi0Z7kymSHZZ) **Sunday at 3 PM

**[Helena:](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dSF8%2B2LJkoVZ5bumHo8YYi0Z7kymSHZZ) **Monday at 5:15 PM

Offices in [ **Missoula**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YPawQvc3JqxCLkeXJCRiiC0Z7kymSHZZ) and [**Kalispell**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7T3zsvoh4qWZH%2FEKA7J1Yy0Z7kymSHZZ) will be opening shortly; sign up now to receive updates.

Looking forward to seeing everyone,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

P.S. We'll continue to open offices throughout the summer so if you don't see a location close to you, we'll be sure to keep you posted about future field HQ's.
---
